hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS" | grep -q 'synthesis/graph/.*\.yaml'; then python3 -c "import yaml, sys; yaml.safe_load(open(sys.argv[1]))" "$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAMS | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4)" 2>&1 && echo 'YAML validation passed' || echo 'WARNING: YAML validation failed'; fi
